objective: Produce the final repository-backed mutation sequence and immediately begin the first bounded implementation mutation.

mutation_sequence.purpose: Introduce Runtime Identity Resolution and evolve RuntimeState.
Consume the evolved RuntimeState without introducing business logic.
Route using identity and progression outcome while preserving existing journeys.
Publish the evolved continuation output for callback authentication.

completion_rule: Mutate one surface at a time. Validate after every mutation. Do not continue to the next surface until validation succeeds.
